markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to discuss GrowthX's SEO and content strategy for Unstructured.io](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Unstructured.io has strong brand awareness but weak organic search performance](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [GrowthX will create SEO-optimized content to improve Unstructured's search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on owning Gen AI data topics across the buyer's journey](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [New Unstructured website launching in June/July; will address current site issues](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Topics

### Current Website Status

  - [Built on Framer in 5 weeks, 2 years ago; was never meant to last this long](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [New site being built on Sanity CMS, expected launch June/July](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Current site has limitations, including inability to add new users](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX performed keyword gap analysis vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Created topic clusters in Airtable for review and approval](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Content will target both technical "champions" and non-technical "buyers"](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Articles aim to resonate across personas while nudging down conversion funnel](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Up to 50,000 words per month (roughly 30-70 articles) once at full scale](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Will start with a calibration article for thorough feedback](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Style guide created based on reference articles: down-to-earth, not too technical](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Each topic includes competitor reference, keyword volume, and search intent](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Tarun (Unstructured) will review and approve final content](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

### Integration with Sales and Marketing

  - [New weekly marketing meeting to share sales team insights](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Content can be flagged for sales team use in outreach](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Aim to create a feedback loop between content, sales, and marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### GrowthX Operations

  - [Dedicated content manager for Unstructured](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Separate teams for competing clients to avoid conflicts of interest](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Encourage frequent communication via Slack for questions and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share Airtable access with Unstructured team](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Review topics and style guide shared after the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Select topic for first calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Tarun to lead content review and approval process](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Cancel next week's meeting due to Unstructured company offsite](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Reconvene in two weeks to continue collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/pbNz5Zs_VykiaHQ8kqkf8S2tLUzrETa2?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
